case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER VS. XIONG ZHAO LIANG

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, XIONG ZHAO , AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA LIANG CONTRACTOR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
